args: set -euo pipefail; pkill -f '/Users/deepsaint/Desktop/megaserver/examples/hello-service/server.py' || true; rm -rf tmp/megad && mkdir -p tmp/megad; cd rust; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megad daemon --bind 127.0.0.1:7712 --ingress-bind 127.0.0.1:8092 >/tmp/megad/daemon.out 2>/tmp/megad/daemon.err & echo $! > /tmp/megad/daemon.pid; for _ in $(seq 1 50); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:7712/v1/health >/dev/null && break; sleep 0.2; done; curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7712/v1/services/deploy -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"app_path":"/Users/deepsaint/Desktop/megaserver/examples/hello-service"}' >/dev/null; curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7712/v1/secrets -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"service":"hello-service","key":"API_KEY","value":"s3cr3t"}' >/dev/null; curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7712/v1/secrets -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"service":"hello-service","key":"MEGASERVER_SIGNING_KEY","value":"sign-secret"}' >/dev/null; curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7712/v1/services/hello-service/shell -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"command":["python3","-c","import os; assert os.environ[\"API_KEY\"]==\"s3cr3t\""]}' | grep -q '"status":"ok"'; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:7712/v1/routes?service=hello-service | grep -q 'hello.local'; signed=$(curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7712/v1/routes/signed-link -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"service":"hello-service","domain":"hello.local","path":"/signed/demo","expires_in":300,"scheme":"http"}' | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["ingress_path"])'); curl -sf -H 'Host: hello.local' "http://127.0.0.1:8092${signed}" | grep -q 'hello from hello-service'; curl -sf -H 'Host: hello.local' http://127.0.0.1:8092/health | grep -q '^ok$'; curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7712/v1/services/hello-service/destroy >/dev/null; kill $(cat /tmp/megad/daemon.pid) || true; wait $(cat /tmp/megad/daemon.pid) 2>/dev/null || true
